text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become an Umamusume who can surpass even
the Emperor Symboli Rudolf...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During her crucial first three years racing, Tokai
Teio has achieved that ambitious dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio once again makes her entrance by
bounding over the track's fence.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: You're in a good mood today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm about to start a new chapter with
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
After everything that happened in the last three
years, I knew we'd both want to keep this
partnership going...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But even so, I needed to hear it straight from you
to make sure, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're the one that helped me obtain my dream.
So, I need you by my side!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
After all, I've got a new dream I wanna go after
now!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna keep racing with you forever and
ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off! Time to start training!
